cit.basis: IRPC (Imposto sobre o Rendimento das Pessoas Colectivas) at 32% standard rate under the Código do IRPC.
cit.note: Agriculture and aquaculture benefit from a reduced 10% IRPC rate under an extended incentive. Mining and petroleum operations fall under specific fiscal regimes (production taxes and dedicated IRPC rules) — out of scope for this SME estimator. Administered by the Autoridade Tributária de Moçambique.

vat.note: IVA at 16% standard rate. Small taxpayers below the registration threshold may opt for the ISPC (Imposto Simplificado para Pequenos Contribuintes), a simplified 3% turnover regime that replaces IVA and IRPC.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Mining/petroleum regimes, ISPC eligibility, withholding taxes, incentives, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official Autoridade Tributária guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
